---
title: "benchmark_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\benchmark_engine.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.10
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 6.85
overall_score: 4.38
---

## Intent
The `benchmark_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on benchmark, BenchmarkOrchestrator, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via benchmark, BenchmarkOrchestrator, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 23 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [statistics](file://statistics)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.report_engine](file://src.core.report_engine)

### Exports
- `benchmark`
- `BenchmarkOrchestrator`
- `execute`
